title: Reading List & Open Online Courses
description: Hand-picked free resources to ground the foundational concepts. More to come as Community Changers vets new sources. No commercial affiliation with any platform listed.

reading_list.title: Reading List (more to come)
reading_list.subtitle: Free textbooks and reference works. Read in browser or download as PDF/HTML.

items.title: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python
items.author: Al Sweigart
items.note: Practical Python through everyday automation tasks. Read free in browser.

items.title: Introduction to Programming Using Java, Eighth Edition
items.author: David J. Eck
items.note: Open textbook hosted by the University of Minnesota Libraries.

items.title: The Modern JavaScript Tutorial
items.author: javascript.info contributors
items.note: Hands-on, modern, free. Excellent companion to L10b HTML.

items.title: Deep Learning
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio & Aaron Courville
items.note: The standard graduate-level reference. Free HTML, read chapter by chapter.

items.title: Free Programming Books (curated index)
items.author: GitHub EbookFoundation
items.note: Massive maintained list of free programming books across dozens of languages.

open_online_courses.title: Open Online Courses
open_online_courses.subtitle: Free coursework from leading universities and open-learning platforms. Certification, where offered, is optional and paid directly to the platform — Community Changers has no affiliation with any of them.

items.name: Carnegie Mellon Open Learning Initiative
items.note: Self-paced courses across statistics, biology, language, and more.

items.name: MIT OpenCourseWare
items.note: Full course materials from MIT — lecture notes, problem sets, video.

items.name: Harvard — Free AI Courses (edX)
items.note: Audit Harvard's AI courses on edX for free. Pay only if you want a certificate.

items.name: python.org (official)
items.note: The official docs and downloads — the source of truth for Python itself.

items.name: Codefinity
items.note: Interactive in-browser coding tracks (free tier available).

items.name: Alison
items.note: Free Java and broad IT/business courses. Certification is paid; learning is free.

items.name: Coddy
items.note: Hands-on HTML, CSS, and front-end practice.

footnote: Inclusion does not imply endorsement of any platform's commercial offerings. All links verified live on the verified_on date. If a link rots, tell us through the in-module survey.
